title: Digital Object Identifiers
description: Persistent identifiers that are globally unique character strings that reference physical, digital, or abstract objects.

definitions.definition: Persistent identifiers that are globally unique character strings that reference physical, digital, or abstract objects. They provide actionable, interoperable, persistent links to information about the objects they reference.
definitions.sources:
- [DOI.org](https://www.doi.org/doi_handbook/Glossary.html)
- NESDIS Data Management Lexicon and Related Terms
